data.name: Dane
data.detailed_description:
Dane（丹恩） 是一款維京後宮題材的戀愛模擬、RPG 與視覺小說，它會讓你的右手升級得比你的戰士還快。探索、戀愛並征服一個充滿慾望的世界，在這裡，每一位女人都能成為你的。

你是一名無所畏懼的戰士，在河岸邊半死不活地醒來……困惑、傷痕累累，並被一位性感的熟女和她叛逆的女兒所救。無處可去的你，踏入了她們那罪惡的小村莊，在那裡，慾望與危險並存。幾乎每一個角色都是一個活生生的幻想，等待著被誘惑、馴服或腐化。

🔥 超過 40 個角色可邂逅，其中 20+ 可約會與攻略
🔥 50+ 個地點可在開放世界沙盒地圖中探索
🔥 100+ 個迷你遊戲塑造你的旅程
🔥 獨特的 RPG 成長與物品系統
🔥 為火熱的維京冒險量身打造的原創戰鬥系統
🔥 日夜循環，包含隱藏任務與分支事件
🔥 約會系統、畫廊與提示進度系統
🔥 數十種癖好的動畫性愛場景

data.short_description: 探索一款開放世界的後宮 RPG、懷孕題材的戀愛模擬，以及設定在奇幻維京世界的視覺小說。成為一名被美麗熟女與她女兒所救的年輕戰士。戰鬥、狩獵、戀愛並繁衍，穿越一個幾乎每個女人都在等待被佔有的村莊。

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.5+ GHz processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Not an integrated video card;
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Dane
data.detailed_description:
Dane is a Viking harem dating sim, RPG, and visual novel that will make your right hand level up faster than your warrior. Explore, romance, and conquer a lust-filled world where every woman is yours to claim.

You are a fearless warrior who wakes up half-dead on a riverbank… confused, bruised, and rescued by a gorgeous milf and her rebellious daughter. With nowhere else to go, you step into their sinful little village, where desire and danger go hand in hand. Nearly every character is a walking fantasy, waiting to be seduced, tamed, or corrupted.

🔥 40+ characters to meet, 20+ to date and seduce

🔥 50+ locations across an open-world sandbox map

🔥 100+ minigames that shape your journey

🔥 Unique RPG progression and item system

🔥 Original battle system tailored for a lusty Viking adventure

🔥 Day/Night cycle with hidden quests and branching events

🔥 Dating system, Gallery, and Tips progression

🔥 Animated sex scenes with dozens of fetishes

data.short_description: Explore an open-world Harem RPG, Impregnation Dating Sim, and Visual Novel set in a Fantasy Viking world. Become a young warrior rescued by a gorgeous milf and her daughter. Fight, hunt, love, and breed your way through a village where nearly every woman waits to be claimed.
